statics.description: As long as CARDNAME's power is 7 or greater, it can attack as though it didn't have defender.

triggers.description: Whenever you proliferate, if CARDNAME is in your graveyard or on the battlefield, CARDNAME perpetually gets +1/+1. You may cast it from your graveyard this turn.
